channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Colorado River management plans to be determined by government after negotiations stall
item.description: The federal government is moving forward with plans on how to manage the Colorado River after negotiations on access stalled between seven Western states and 30 tribal nations.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Detained immigrant children still face concerning conditions at Texas facility, lawyers say
item.description: Nearly 600 immigrant children were held in a Texas family detention center in recent months beyond court-mandated limits and without enough food, medical care or mental health services, with dozens languishing inside for more than three months, according to court documents filed Friday.
item.dc:creator: Garance Burke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: ICE officers soon will help with airport security unless Democrats end shutdown, Trump says
item.description: President Donald Trump says he'll order federal immigration officers to take a role soon in airport security unless Democrats agree on a bill to fund the Department of Homeland Security.
item.dc:creator: Collin Binkley, Associated Press, KPRC 2
